dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 4130 RH: Small Business Relief Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Garbarino introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services
Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic
For text of introduced bill, see copy of bill as introduced on June 25, 2025

form.official-title: To amend the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 to exclude qualified institutional buyers and institutional accredited investors when calculating holders of a security for purposes of the mandatory registration threshold under such Act, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Small Business Relief Act.
Section 12(g)(1) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (15 U.S.C. 78l(g)(1)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subparagraph (A)(i), by inserting after persons the following: (that are not a qualified institutional buyer or an institutional accredited investor); and
in subparagraph (B), by inserting after persons the following: (that are not a qualified institutional buyer or an institutional accredited investor).

endorsement.action-desc: Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
